error.signature: CommitFailedException: Commit cannot be completed since the group has already rebalanced

verdict.summary: Consumer group rebalanced while processing messages. Processing took longer than session.timeout.ms or max.poll.interval.ms.

dead_ends.action: Set session.timeout.ms to very large value
dead_ends.why_fails: Delays detection of genuinely failed consumers; dead consumers block partition processing

dead_ends.action: Disable auto-commit and never commit offsets
dead_ends.why_fails: Without commits, all messages are reprocessed on restart, causing duplicates

workarounds.action: Increase max.poll.interval.ms to match expected processing time
workarounds.how: max.poll.interval.ms=600000  # 10 minutes; adjust to your processing time

workarounds.action: Reduce max.poll.records to process fewer messages per poll
workarounds.how: max.poll.records=100  # process smaller batches to stay within poll interval

workarounds.action: Move heavy processing to async worker pool
workarounds.how: Poll quickly, dispatch to thread pool, commit after completion
